back_translation: Every commandment that I am commanding you today, you shall keep to do, so that you may live and multiply, and enter and possess the land that the Lord swore to your fathers.

And you shall remember all the way that the Lord your God led you these forty years in the wilderness, in order to humble you and to test you, to know what was in your heart, whether you would keep His commandments or not.

And He humbled you and made you hungry and fed you the manna that you did not know and your fathers did not know, in order to make known to you that not on bread alone shall man live, but on everything that comes out from the mouth of the Lord shall man live.
Your garment did not wear out from upon you, and your foot did not swell, these forty years.
And you shall know with your heart that just as a man disciplines his son, the Lord your God disciplines you.
And you shall keep the commandments of the Lord your God, to walk in His ways and to fear Him.
For the Lord your God is bringing you to a good land, a land of brooks of water, fountains, and deeps that come forth in the valley and on the mountain;
a land of wheat and barley and vine and fig and pomegranate, a land of olive oil and honey;
a land where not in scarcity you will eat bread in it, you will not lack anything in it; a land whose stones are iron, and from its hills you will hew copper.
And you shall eat and be satisfied, and you shall bless the Lord your God for the good land that He has given you.
Watch yourself, lest you forget the Lord your God, by not keeping His commandments and His judgments and His statutes that I am commanding you today.
Lest you eat and be satisfied, and good houses you build and dwell,
and your herds and your flocks multiply, and silver and gold multiply for you, and all that you have multiplies.
And your heart becomes lifted up, and you forget the Lord your God who brought you out from the land of Egypt, from the house of slaves,
who led you in the great and terrible wilderness, venomous serpent and scorpion and thirst where there is no water, who brought out for you water from the rock of flint,
who fed you manna in the wilderness, that your fathers did not know, in order to humble you and in order to test you, to do good to you in your end.
And you say in your heart: My power and the strength of my hand have made for me this wealth.
And you shall remember the Lord your God, that He is the one who gives you power to make wealth, in order to establish His covenant that He swore to your fathers as it is this day.
And it shall be, if forgetting you forget the Lord your God and walk after other gods and serve them and bow down to them, I testify against you today that perishing, you shall perish.
Like the nations that the Lord is destroying from before you, so you shall perish, as a result of your not listening to the voice of the Lord your God.
